app.title: Navigator for Digital Transformation
app.subtitle: Self-reflection for schools in digital transformation
app.description: An interactive tool based on the Compass for Digital Transformation by PH Zurich

reflection.title: Guided self-reflection
reflection.intro: These questions are meant to provoke thought — there are no right or wrong answers.
reflection.startPrompt: Which dimension would you like to start with?

chat.title: Free reflection
chat.placeholder: Ask a question about digital transformation...
chat.disclaimer: The Navigator supports your reflection — it does not assess or judge.

footer.by: by PH Zurich, Centre for Media Education and Computer Science

glossary.picts: PICTS: Pedagogical ICT Support — experts in the didactic implementation of media and computer science
glossary.fourCs: 4 Cs: Creativity, Critical thinking, Collaboration, Communication
